The Hatchet has high range, lingering shots, and the bleeding effect to make up for it. The rest of the set trades Speedy for a close range, AoE paralysis and +10 DEF for a fairly long time when you take enough damage.
History Before Exalt Version 3.3.5.0 (Mar 2023), this set’s bonuses were as follows:
2nd piece bonus: +20 HP, +10 MP, +10 ATT, +2 DEF 3rd piece bonus: +35 HP, +15 MP, +15 ATT, +5 DEF 4th piece bonus: +55 HP, +25 MP, +25 ATT, +8 DEF
This made the 3/4 set (helm, armor, and accessory) an incredibly powerful set, outdamaging the combination of T7 Helm, Gladiator Guard and The Forgotten Crown while giving +40 HP for only -2 DEF.
Before Exalt Version 6.4.0.0 (Dec 2025), this set’s bonuses were as follows:
2nd piece bonus: +20 HP, +10 MP, +4 ATT, +2 DEF 3rd piece bonus: +35 HP, +15 MP, +6 ATT, +4 DEF 4th piece bonus: +55 HP, +25 MP, +10 ATT, +10 DEX, +6 DEF

The set confers additional stat bonuses when at least two of the items are worn together. Wearing the full set transforms the huntress player into a 16x16 sprite and changes the weapon’s shot.

name: Swoll Paladin Set
description: Notes The Swoll Paladin Set was the second ST set to be released, and included the first ST items that weren’t straight reskins of tiered equipment. The items drop from boss enemies in the Candyland Hunting Grounds dungeon.
bonuses: 2nd Piece Bonus +30 HP, +25 MP, +2 ATT
3rd Piece Bonus +40 HP, +25 MP, +4 ATT
4th Piece Bonus +50 HP, +50 MP, +6 ATT
Subtotal of Bonuses +120 HP, +100 MP, +12 ATT
Overall Stat Bonus TBA
Total XP Bonus 20%
History Before Patch X.31.8.0 (July 2019), this set’s stat bonuses gave +50 MP with 2 pieces, +5 DEF and +5 SPD with 3 pieces, and +50 HP and +2 ATT with all 4 pieces.
Before Exalt Version 6.4.0.0 (Dec 2025), this set’s bonuses were as follows:
2nd piece bonus: +25 HP, +25 MP, +2 DEF, +2 ATT 3rd piece bonus: +25 HP, +25 MP, +2 DEF, +2 ATT 4th piece bonus: +25 HP, +25 MP, +2 DEF, +2 ATT
